element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Aliens fly into formation from top/sides and dive toward player while shooting
Four large aliens at top of formation; capture player ship via tractor beam; require two shots to destroy
Shooting down Boss Galaga during dive with captured ship grants dual-fighter with increased firepower and larger hitbox
Every fourth stage thereafter; aliens fly in preset formation without firing; risk-free scoring opportunity
Enemies morph into new types with different attack patterns; Galaxian Flagship variants introduced
Enemy aggressiveness scales; more projectiles and faster dive patterns as game progresses

typical_relief_triggers: Bonus stages (every 4th stage) with no enemy fire
Destroying all aliens in formation completes stage and resets board
typical_tension_triggers: Boss Galaga tractor beam capture mechanic
Enemy type morphing with unpredictable attack patterns
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation with periodic safe relief; tension increases as game advances through stages; dual-fighter mechanic creates risk-reward tension (rescue opportunity vs. penalty for failure)

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Dual-fighter rescue mechanic functions as optional high-skill challenge; destroyed Boss Galaga with captured ship can be recovered for bonus firepower

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; basic enemy formations and slow dive patterns establish core mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; enemy aggressiveness increases, projectile density rises, variant enemy types appear
difficulty_curve.late_game: High; combination of dense projectile patterns, faster dive attacks, and enemy morphing creates sustained pressure
notable_spikes: Stage 3+ onward: progressive increase in enemy aggression
Introduction of enemy type variants: unpredictable attack patterns
Stage 255 kill screen: technical ceiling (arcade original bug)

notable_level_patterns.description: Preset alien formation flies without firing projectiles; functions as risk-free scoring opportunity and tension relief valve within progression structure
Aliens enter from top/sides in formation, dive toward player while shooting; Boss Galaga positioned at top of formation with tractor beam capability
Enemy behavior intensifies across stages: increased projectile count, faster dive speeds, introduction of morphing variants
